allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('data.xlsx'\); ws = wb.active; print\(f'Columns: {[cell.value for cell in ws[1]]}'\); print\(f'Row count: {ws.max_row}'\); print\('Sample rows:'\); [print\(f'{ws.cell\(i, 1\).value}, {ws.cell\(i, 2\).value}'\) for i in range\(2, min\(11, ws.max_row + 1\)\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import pandas; df = pandas.read_excel\('data.xlsx'\); print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\); print\(df.head\(10\)\); print\('\\n...'\); print\(df.tail\(5\)\)")
